title: pilea engleri
intro: Pilea engleri, also known as Chinese lettuce or flatstemmed pilea, is a type of succulent plant native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, rounded leaves and delicate stems. Traditionally, Pilea engleri has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of consuming Pilea engleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. In terms of herbal preparations, Pilea engleri can be consumed as a leafy green vegetable, added to salads or stir-fries, or made into a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water.
